transcript: How's it going everybody? They say that every great country is built on the back of its businesses. And so we should be really proud of the work that the founders in our ecosystem have done. So let's give another big round of applause to the winners, the competitors, to every single participant in Colosseum. Awesome. Thank you so much. My name is Farhaj, I'm the co-founder of Forma, and we develop Solana Economic Zones in frontier markets by partnering with governments. So, a lot of people had the same question. What is a Solana Economic Zone? And our definition to that is they are physical hubs that drive economic activity between cloud, Solana, and land, nation states. Over the last two years, we've done four popup villages around the world, hosted it in three continents, and had over a thousand members join our network state. Thank you, thank you. Okay, one more round of applause! Get hyped up! It's the last day in Abu Dhabi! You know, ground changing technology being built here? But cool, I'm gonna dive into the impact real quick. So yeah, over this period of time, we've had three long-term Solana hubs we established. We've generated over 10 million dollars in foreign direct investment for these countries that we work with. And we've also generated over 10 million impressions on X for the countries that we work with, promoting their stories and highlighting their economy. And today I want to dive into one special example, which is Kazakhstan, that I'm sure a handful of you saw on the internet. This was a first of its kind partnership between a nation state and the Solana network state. We hosted a one-day summit and a one-week trade mission, where we had over 150,000 people tune in to watch it live. We hosted over 250 government officials and regulators, and signed four landmark MOUs. And for one second if I could just get everyone's attention. I want you to look at what's on the screen. And we actually had Kazakhstan recognize the region's first ever Solana Economic Zone and signed an MOU with the Solana Foundation. That was really, really cool, right? And let me tell you what, we're just getting started. Solana is not just about paper MOUs, we're about products launching. And after signing that MOU, we had the Central Bank work with an ecosystem company to launch the national currency Tenge as a stablecoin on Solana. We also signed a landmark MOU with AIX, a Nasdaq-powered stock exchange, to dual list public companies on Solana. And Superteam Kazakhstan hosted a national hackathon that trained over a thousand developers with the Ministry of AI. That's really cool. That's not all. The President, after the time we spent there and our conversations with a lot of people in government, also launched the National Crypto Reserve and announced Crypto City. An entire city that's going to be a testing ground for frontier technologies, especially blockchain. So, a lot of people might be asking, you know, spent last two years hosting these popup villages, working with governments, so what's next for Forma? And I really want to quickly reference this amazing article that Balaji wrote, talking about how popups are the new startups. Where how these cloud communities could band together and start to establish really amazing places in the real world. And I really want to emphasize on the next stage of evolution for these popups, 'cause we've been hosting it for the last two years. And my intuition is that popups could actually evolve into something that looks like a Network City. Where a community works directly with a government and turns a physical city within that country into the world's most competitive jurisdiction for internet talent, for internet capital, and establishing a new kind of economic engine that can actually drive economic growth. So, fun fact, Forma is gonna make a very big leap and go from popup to permanent. After doing popups in Argentina, Sri Lanka, Kazakhstan, Georgia, working directly with these countries and meeting with over 40 different countries, we found one place to go all in on. And I'm really excited to announce it's gonna be the Isle of Man. Thank you, thank you. Thank you. A lot of you might not know about this amazing place, so I'm gonna tell you a little bit about it. It's a self-governing crown dependency, an island that's about the size of Singapore, right in between Ireland and the UK. It's a whitelisted financial hub that has 0% corporate tax, 0% capital gains tax. It's one of the top five safest countries in the world, and just a one hour flight away from London and Dublin, and a 20 minute flight to Liverpool. This place is absolutely stunning, with breathtaking nature and people that make you feel just at home. So we're really, really excited to go permanent, and we and our team are gonna move there to turn this into the best city in the world for people from the Solana network. Thank you so much. If this crazy idea is interesting to you, highly recommend signing up on the waitlist and we'd love to host you there next year. But again, I'm really blessed that Breakpoint has come to my home country, the UAE, and hosted such an amazing conference here bringing all people from over 105 countries together. So another big thank you to everyone who's come here, and I'll see you around. Ciao.

Dec 3, 2025 11:47 AM Eastern Standard Time
# **Franklin Templeton Expands Its Digital Asset ETP Suite With Launch of Franklin Solana ETF (SOEZ)**
Share
*SOEZ provides institutional access to one of the fastest growing blockchain networks through a regulated, transparent ETF structure*
SAN MATEO, Calif.--([BUSINESS WIRE](https://www.businesswire.com))--Franklin Templeton, a global investment leader with more than $1.6 trillion in assets under management, today announced the launch of Franklin Solana ETF (NYSE Arca: SOEZ) (the “Fund”), an exchange traded product (ETP) designed to provide investors with exposure to the price movements of Solana (SOL), the native token of one of the most active and scalable blockchain networks. SOEZ seeks to reflect generally the performance of the price of Solana and the rewards from staking as much of the Fund’s Solana as is practicable (up to 100%), before payment of the Fund’s expenses and liabilities. The Fund receives staking rewards in the form of Solana tokens (SOL), which may be treated as income. Staking Solana on the network may also enhance network security and stability. The Fund’s SOL cash value is calculated by valuing the SOL held by the Fund based on the CME CF Solana-Dollar Reference Rate, New York

sources.title: Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates

Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates

Launch App

## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents
](#)
[
Contents
](#)
[
](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

tags.impact_reason: Farhaj Mayan's keynote highlights Forma's work in establishing Solana Economic Zones with nation-states, including Kazakhstan's recognition of a Solana Economic Zone and plans for a Crypto City, signaling institutional adoption and integration of Solana into national economies.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a lighthouse on the cliffs of the Isle of Man as the Semantic Anchor. This is explicitly suggested by the story's location and serves as a powerful metaphor for Forma creating a stable, permanent beacon (a guiding light) for the crypto world in a new jurisdiction. The integrated text '0%' is taken directly from the standfirst, highlighting the key economic incentive of this new hub. Making it diegetically etched into the lighthouse lens, illuminated from within, integrates this crucial detail into the futuristic and institutional mood of the piece.
visual_idea.description: A brutalist, futuristic lighthouse made of polished black obsidian stands defiant on the rugged cliffs of the Isle of Man at dusk. Instead of a traditional lamp, its lantern room projects a powerful, focused beam of glowing purple and green Solana data blocks into a stormy sky. Etched into the thick glass of the lantern lens, the characters '0%' are subtly visible, illuminated from within by the data beam. The background is a deep, atmospheric view of a turbulent sea crashing against the cliffs below, creating a sense of enduring stability amidst chaos.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A brutalist, futuristic lighthouse made of lustrous, polished black obsidian stands defiant and monumental on the rugged cliffs of the Isle of Man at dusk, its highly reflective surfaces catching the dim, dramatic light. Instead of a traditional lamp, its lantern room projects a powerful, focused, volumetric beam of glowing purple and green Solana data blocks, forming a vibrant, spatially correct holographic projection into a turbulent, stormy sky. Etched deeply into the thick, polished glass of the lantern lens, the characters '0%' are subtly visible, illuminated from within by the intense, glowing data beam, creating an internal glow on the glass. The background is a deep, atmospheric view of a stormy, turbulent sea crashing against the cliffs below, with dramatic waves and sea spray, creating a sense of enduring stability amidst chaos. The scene is lit with high contrast, casting deep shadows from the obsidian structure and providing subtle rim lighting on the crashing waves, emphasizing the epic scale and height of the lighthouse against the vast, dark sky. Composed for a 3:4 vertical aspect ratio, emphasizing the lighthouse's towering presence and leaving significant negative space at the top to convey monumentality. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, physically based rendering, volumetric light, dramatic atmospheric perspective.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a lighthouse on the cliffs of the Isle of Man as the Semantic Anchor. This is explicitly suggested by the story's location and serves as a powerful metaphor for Forma creating a stable, permanent beacon (a guiding light) for the crypto world in a new jurisdiction. The integrated text '0%' is taken directly from the standfirst, highlighting the key economic incentive of this new hub. Making it diegetically etched into the lighthouse lens, illuminated from within, integrates this crucial detail into the futuristic and institutional mood of the piece.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the intricate lantern room of the futuristic lighthouse. We see the complex, crystalline lens structure, through which a swirling vortex of purple and green holographic data particles—the source of the light—is visible. The polished, dark obsidian framework of the lighthouse beautifully reflects the internal glow. The focus is on the fusion of raw material and complex, luminous technology, conveying power and sophistication.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot, tightly framed and centrally focused, showcasing the intricate lantern room of a futuristic lighthouse. The square composition (1:1 aspect ratio) emphasizes symmetry and fills the frame with rich detail. At the core, a complex, crystalline lens structure dominates, through which a dynamic, swirling vortex of vibrant purple and luminous green holographic data particles is visibly generating the light source. These particles appear spatially correct, high-contrast, and emit a brilliant, internal glow, reminiscent of advanced, ray-traced optics. The lighthouse's framework is crafted from dark, polished obsidian, meticulously rendered to beautifully reflect the intense internal glow of the holographic data. The obsidian surface is ultra-detailed, showcasing realistic materials and subtle subsurface scattering, enhancing its deep, reflective quality. The overall scene is bathed in dramatic, atmospheric lighting, with strong contrast and a high falloff outside the central luminous core, creating a sense of profound power and sophisticated technological elegance. The internal glow casts subtle, intricate light patterns and ambient occlusion onto the polished obsidian, highlighting the fusion of raw material and complex, luminous technology. 8k, hyperrealistic, octane render, raytracing, physically based rendering (PBR), ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, volumetric light, photorealistic.

editorial.headline: Forma Announces Permanent Solana Economic Zone in Isle of Man
editorial.standfirst: Network state infrastructure provider Forma pivots from pop-up villages to a permanent jurisdiction, securing a 0% tax hub in the British Isles to rival Singapore for crypto talent.
key_takeaways: Isle of Man selected as first permanent 'Solana Economic Zone' offering 0% corporate and capital gains tax.
Proof-of-concept in Kazakhstan yielded a Central Bank-backed Tenge stablecoin and Nasdaq-powered AIX dual listings.
Forma reports generating $10M in Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) across previous pop-up jurisdictions.
editorial.article_body_markdown: The theoretical framework of the "Network State" is moving into operational reality. Forma, the entity behind a series of pop-up crypto villages, announced its strategic pivot from temporary experiments to a permanent jurisdiction. Co-founder Farhaj Mayan revealed that the Isle of Man will host the first permanent Solana Economic Zone. This selection is a calculated move to capture institutional capital; as a self-governing Crown dependency, the Isle of Man offers a "whitelisted" regulatory environment compatible with global compliance standards while maintaining a 0% corporate and capital gains tax regime. This transition is underwritten by significant validation from Forma’s pilot program in Kazakhstan. Unlike typical crypto conferences, the Kazakhstan initiative resulted in deep integration with state financial infrastructure. Mayan disclosed that the pilot facilitated the launch of the national currency, the Tenge, as a stablecoin on Solana, executed in partnership with the Central Bank. Furthermore, Forma secured an MOU with AIX, a Nasdaq-powered stock exchange, to enable dual listings of public companies on Solana. This establishes a tangible bridge between traditional capital markets and on-chain liquidity, moving beyond simple "innovation theater." The economic implications for host nations are becoming quantifiable. Forma reports generating over $10M in Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) for its partner countries to date. By establishing a permanent base in the British Isles—located just one hour from London—Forma is effectively creating a regulatory sandbox that combines the physical security and legal clarity of Western Europe with the aggressive economic incentives required to attract high-velocity crypto startups. For institutional investors, this represents a de-risked entry point into jurisdictional arbitrage, offering a compliant domicile for decentralized teams.
